original_prompt: You are a migration agent. Migrate the application from Firebase Firestore to Firebase Realtime Database (RTDB) and ensure full compatibility. Migrate all view files, controllers, and backend logic. Address the current deployment errors (Unexpected token <, Doctype) caused by routing issues. Address style/classList property access errors.

tasks.description: Examine server routing and Vite build configuration.
Correct Vite build config for production.
Big Boss Sweep: Check all routes and deployments.
